name: rptc
description: Research -> Plan -> TDD -> Commit workflow with quality gates, test-driven implementation, and documentation review.

interface.shortDescription: Research, plan, implement with TDD, verify, and ship.
interface.longDescription: RPTC packages a Codex adapter for the original Research -> Plan -> TDD -> Commit workflow. Codex skills are exposed from ./codex/skills/. Custom RPTC agents are packaged in ./codex/agents/ and installed with the rptc-init skill, which copies them to .codex/agents/ or the user's Codex agents directory.
defaultPrompt: Use RPTC to implement this feature.
Use RPTC to fix this bug.
